The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Bill Payments Volume
Online Tracing System Part
Section 1.3, Billers that Donât Accept Trace Requests from Central 1
The table of billers that donât accept trace requests has been removed. We added instructions on how to use the EBP Billers list to determine if a biller will accept trace requests or not.
Central 1 Banking Services Volume
Current Accounts Services (CAS) Online Part
Section 6.4, Viewing Recent Transactions
Section 7.2, Viewing Account Activity
We added references to Transaction and Charge Codes, Form 3667. Users should refer to this form to see a list of transaction codes, transactions descriptions, and reference number details.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
FX Drafts Part
Section 1.3, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
Convera can now only be contacted at
